person.name: Béatrice d'Albon dauphine de Viennois
person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
geni.com
Beatrice d'Albon, Dauphine of Vienne, Countess of Albon & Grésivaudan
Birthdate:	around 1161
Birthplace:	Albon, Rhone-Alpes, France
Death:	December 15, 1228 (62-71)
Chateau de Vizille, Isère, Rhone-Alpes, France
Place of Burial:	France
Immediate Family:	
Daughter of Guigues V Dauphin, Count of Albon and Grenoble and Beatrice Aleramici, del Monferrato

Wife of Hugues de Coligny, Lord of Coligny-le-Neuf ; Alberic Taillefer, Count of Saint-Gilles and Hugh III, Duke of Burgundy

Mother of 
Beatrix de Coligny de la Tour, de Pin, Dame de Malleval ; Marquise d'Albon ; 
Mary of Burgundy ; 
Andrew Guigues VI of Viennese, Count of Albon, Briançon, 
Grenoble, and Oisans ; 
Mahaut de Bourgogne Sister of Alix (D'Aubergne) du Puy, Princess Dauphine ; 
Maria of Vienna; and 
Marguerite or Anne of Burgundy « less
and Marquise d'Albon

Half sister of Enrico II del Carretto, marchese di Savona ; Ottone del Carretto, Marquess of Dego & Roccaverano ; Bonifacio del Carretto, vescovo ; Isabella del Carretto ; Ambrogio del Carretto, bishop of Savona ; and Caracosa di Gavi “less
Occupation:	Condessa de Albon and Dauphine de Viena, Countess, d'Albon, de Viennois, de Grésivauan, Dauphine, Duchess of Burgundy, Duphine du Viennois, Countess d'Albon & du Gresivaudan
Managed by:	Private User
Last Updated:	October 31, 2022
_______________________________________________
Béatrice, Countess of Albon and Dauphine of Viennois (1161-1228) became countess and dauphine in 1162 upon the death of her father Guigues V.

She married Hugh III, Duke of Burgundy in 1183 and had three children:

1.) André Guigues VI (1184-1237), Dauphin of Viennois

2.) Mahaut (1190-1242), married in 1214 John I, Count of Châlon and Auxonne (1190-1267)

3.) Marguerite (1192-1243), married c 1217 Amadeus IV, Count of Savoy (1197-1253), Count of Savoy

zh.lifeSummary: 當Béatrice d'Albon dauphine de Viennois於1162年12月29日出生在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯易瑟艾維其勒時，她的父親Guigues V d'Albon37歲，母親Béatrice DE MONTFERRAT-DE BABENBERG20歲。她於1184年與Hugues III de Bourgogne在法國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1228年12月15日在她的家鄉享年65歲，埋葬在法國o-阿爾培斯易瑟艾可洛勒斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Béatrice d'Albon dauphine de Viennois于1162年12月29日出生在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯易瑟艾維其勒时，她的父亲Guigues V d'Albon37岁，母亲Béatrice DE MONTFERRAT-DE BABENBERG20岁。她于1184年与Hugues III de Bourgogne在法国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1228年12月15日在她的家乡享年65岁，埋葬在法国o-阿爾培斯易瑟艾可洛勒斯。

nameMeanings.name: d'Albon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Staffordshire): nickname or habitational name from Norman French Malbanc, which may be from Old French mal banc ‘bad bench’, but if so the reason for the use of this expression as a surname is unknown. Possibly it derives from a lost placename, in which banc may mean ‘steep crag’. The second part of the name, -banc, survives in Maybank , but medieval forms in -ban(e), -bon(e), or -bun are also common and are sometimes later re-interpreted as -born and -bourne, leading to confusion with Melbourne .

variants.name: Mabon
meanings: Scottish: from a Brittonic personal name Mabon or Maban, apparently derivatives of Maponos, the name of an ancient Celtic god.
Possibly also English (of Norman origin): variant of Malbon with loss of -l-.
In some cases possibly also Breton: ultimately of the same origin as the Scottish name (see 1 above).

variants.name: Maybank
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Malbon  .

nameMeanings.name: Béatrice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and French form of   Beatrix  , which was quite popular in England during the Middle Ages, and strongly revived in the 19th century. It is most famous as the name of Dante's beloved, and is borne by the elder (  b. 1988 ) of the Duke of York's daughters.

en.lifeSummary: When Béatrice d'Albon dauphine de Viennois was born on 29 December 1162, in Vizille, Isère, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, her father, Guigues V d'Albon, was 37 and her mother, Béatrice DE MONTFERRAT-DE BABENBERG, was 20. She married Hugues III de Bourgogne in 1184, in France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 15 December 1228, in her hometown, at the age of 65, and was buried in Crolles, Isère, Rhône-Alpes, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Béatrice d'Albon dauphine de Viennois est née le 29 décembre 1162, à Vizille, Isère, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, son père, Guigues V d'Albon, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Béatrice DE MONTFERRAT-DE BABENBERG, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Hugues III de Bourgogne en 1184, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 15 décembre 1228, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterrée à Crolles, Isère, Rhône-Alpes, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Béatrice d'Albon dauphine de Viennois am 29. Dezember 1162 in Vizille, Isère, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guigues V d'Albon 37 und ihre Mutter Béatrice DE MONTFERRAT-DE BABENBERG 20. Sie hat 1184 in Frankreich Hugues III de Bourgogne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 15. Dezember 1228 im Alter von 65 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Crolles, Isère, Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Béatrice d'Albon dauphine de Viennois è nata il il 29 dicembre 1162 nel Vizille, Isère, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, sua padre, Guigues V d'Albon, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Béatrice DE MONTFERRAT-DE BABENBERG, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Hugues III de Bourgogne nel 1184, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 15 dicembre 1228, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolta a Crolles, Isère, Rhône-Alpes, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Béatrice d'Albon dauphine de Viennoisが1162年12月29日にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスイスeアヴィズイルで生まれた時，父Guigues V d'Albonは37歳，母Béatrice DE MONTFERRAT-DE BABENBERGは20歳であった。1184年にフランスでHugues III de Bourgogneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1228年12月15日に故郷で65歳で死去し，フランスルhoネ-アルペスイスeアクロレスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Béatrice d'Albon dauphine de Viennois(이)가 1162년 12월 29일 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 이스e르 비지에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guigues V d'Albon(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Béatrice DE MONTFERRAT-DE BABENBERG(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1184년 프랑스에서 Hugues III de Bourgogne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1228년 12월 15일 그녀의 고향에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 ho니-알프스 이스e르 크로레스에 묻혔다.

mn.29 décembre 1162–15 December 1228: 1162 оны Арванхоёрдугаар сарын 29–1228 оны Арванхоёрдугаар сарын 15

pt.29 décembre 1162–15 December 1228: 29 de dezembro de 1162–15 de dezembro de 1228
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Béatrice d'Albon dauphine de Viennois nasceu em 29 de dezembro de 1162, em Vizille, Isère, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França, seu pai, Guigues V d'Albon, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Béatrice DE MONTFERRAT-DE BABENBERG, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Hugues III de Bourgogne em 1184, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 15 de dezembro de 1228, em sua cidade natal, com 65 anos, e foi sepultada em Crolles, Isère, Rhône-Alpes, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Béatrice d'Albon dauphine de Viennois родилась 29 декабря 1162 г. в местности визилл, исeр, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция, её отцу по имени Guigues V d'Albon было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Béatrice DE MONTFERRAT-DE BABENBERG, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugues III de Bourgogne в 1184 г. в местности Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 15 декабря 1228 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 65 лет и была похоронена в местности кроллесь, исeр, рoне-алпесь, Франция.

es.29 décembre 1162–15 December 1228: 29 de diciembre de 1162–15 de diciembre de 1228
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Béatrice d'Albon dauphine de Viennois nació el 29 de diciembre de 1162, en Vizille, Isère, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, su papá, Guigues V d'Albon, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Béatrice DE MONTFERRAT-DE BABENBERG, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Hugues III de Bourgogne en 1184, en Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 15 de diciembre de 1228, en su pueblo, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultada en Crolles, Isère, Rhône-Alpes, Francia.
